name: get_post
description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific post by ID. Returns comprehensive post data including status, content, author, channel references, tags, notes, assets (images, videos, documents), and allowed actions. The metadata field contains service-specific data (e.g., Instagram geolocation, Twitter threads, YouTube privacy settings, Pinterest boards). Posts with status "error" include an error field with the failure message. Set `includeMetrics: true` to additionally return per-post analytics (reactions, comments, impressions, etc.) and a `metricsUpdatedAt` freshness timestamp. Only set true when the user asks about post performance. Use list_posts to discover post IDs.

postId.description: The ID of the post to retrieve. Use list_posts to discover post IDs.

includeMetrics.description: Set true to also return per-post analytics (reactions, comments, impressions, etc.) and `metricsUpdatedAt` (freshness timestamp; metrics refresh daily, can lag up to ~24h). Default false — adds latency and response size. Only set true when the user asks about post performance.
